description: Star Wars Creator George Lucas Is Very Much Pro AI for Making Movies  IGNGeorge Lucas likens AI sceptics to luddites clinging to horses and carts  The GuardianGeorge Lucas Is Pro AI, Which Shouldn’t Be a Surprise  GizmodoGeorge Lucas Goes To The Dark Side, Says AI Is ‘The Future’  KotakuGeorge Lucas Says AI Makes Filmmaking ‘Easier’ and ‘There’s Nothing You Can Do About It,’ Criticizes Hollywood for Giving Fans Too Much Power  Variety
